product: Share Genie Spaces externally using OpenSharing (Beta) ​
tagline: June 17, 2026 Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing.
what_it_does: June 17, 2026 Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing. Databricks creates a point in time snapshot of the space's data assets and instructions.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 17, 2026 Providers
capabilities.desc: June 17, 2026 Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing.

key_takeaway: June 17, 2026 Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing.
